commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR passes OpenAI/Codex-compatible auth providers into `/models` auth-label rendering, adds model command regression tests, and records the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main calls the `/models` auth-label resolver without OpenAI/Codex accepted providers, and the PR wires that in for text paths but still leaves the Telegram native callback without the active agent id.
commands.review_followup: This automerge-opted replacement PR has one narrow mechanical blocker: thread the active Telegram agent id into the existing model-list label call and add focused coverage.

target.title: fix(models): respect auth order in picker label
